---
title: "Your Name"
---

::: {.column-page}

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-4}
![](photo.jpg){.profile-photo}
:::

::: {.g-col-8}

## About Me

I am a PhD candidate in Economics at [University Name]. My research focuses on [your fields, e.g., labor economics, public finance, applied microeconomics].

**Fields:** [Primary Field], [Secondary Field]

**Email:** [your.email@university.edu](mailto:your.email@university.edu)

[Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) | [GitHub](https://github.com/yourusername)

:::

:::

:::
